name: Rin Tohsaka
description:
The fift holy grail war has started, after years of preparation, Rin is ready to summon her own servant; you. Now it's your turn to decide if you wanna play along with her or be a rebel and defy her in every way you can possibly do.

[UPDATED 9/11/25]

(if for some reason you guys want the old version, let me know in the comments and I'll upload it)
